name: bln

metadata.name: bln
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Python client for the biglocalnews.org API

documentation:
Python client for the biglocalnews.org API

## Links

- Documentation: [bln-python-client.readthedocs.io](https://bln-python-client.readthedocs.io/)
- Repository: [github.com/biglocalnews/bln-python-client](https://github.com/biglocalnews/bln-python-client)
- Packaging: [pypi.org/project/bln](https://pypi.org/project/bln/)

## About

The project is sponsored by [Big Local News](https://biglocalnews.org/#/about), a program at Stanford University that collects data for impactful journalism. The code is maintained by Stanford Lecturer [Serdar Tumgoren](https://comm.stanford.edu/faculty-tumgoren/) and [Ben Welsh](https://palewi.re/who-is-ben-welsh/), a visiting data journalist from the Los Angeles Times.

classes.name: bln.exceptions.APIException
documentation: An error raised when accessing the biglocalnews.org API.

functions.name: bln.pandas.register
documentation:
Register the Big Local News extensions to pandas.

Args:
    pd (module): A pandas module you've imported elsewhere.

functions.name: bln.pandas.read_bln.read_bln
documentation:
Read in the provided file from biglocalnews.org and return a pandas dataframe.

The filenames must end with .csv, .json, .xls, or .xlsx, which are mapped to the appropriate pandas reader function.

Args:
    project_id (str): The unique identifier of the biglocalnews.org project where the file is stored. (Required)
    file_name (str): The name of the file within the biglocalnews.org project.
    api_token (str): An API key from biglocalnews.org with permission to read from the project. (Required but can be drawn from the env variable `BLN_API_TOKEN`)
    tier (str): The biglocalnews.org environment to access. (Required but default is 'prod', which will work for most users.)
    **kwargs: Any other pandas options to be passed into the file reader.

Returns a pandas DataFrame.

methods.name: bln.client.Client.__init__
documentation:
Create a Big Local News Python Client.

Args:
    token: a personal token generated on the Big Local News website.
    tier: only 'prod' will work for external developers.

Returns:
    client: a Big Local News Python Client.

methods.name: bln.client.Client.createGroup
documentation:
Create a group.

Args:
    name: Group name.
    contact: A phone number with format "+X (XXX) XXX-XXXX" or email;
        defaults to author's contact value.
    contactMethod: PHONE or EMAIL; defaults to author's contact method.
    description: Group details.
    userRoles: Define user admins and members; defaults to
        author as sole admin.

Returns:
    group: the resulting group or None if error.

methods.name: bln.client.Client.createPersonalToken
documentation: Create a personal token.

methods.name: bln.client.Client.createProject
documentation:
Create a project.

Args:
    name: Project name.
    contact: A phone number with format "+X (XXX) XXX-XXXX" or email;
        defaults to author's contact value.
    contactMethod: PHONE or EMAIL; defaults to author's contact method.
    description: Project details.
    isOpen: Whether to make the project open to others on the platform;
        defaults to False.
    userRoles: Define user admins, editors, and viewers; defaults
        to author as sole admin.
    groupRoles: Define group admins, editors, and viewers; defaults
        to no group roles.
    tags: Project tags.

Returns:
    project: the resulting project or None if error.

methods.name: bln.client.Client.upload_files
documentation: Upload a files to the provided project id.

methods.name: bln.client.Client.upload_file
documentation:
Upload a file locally to a project.

Args:

    path: the path of the file to upload.

methods.name: bln.client.Client.updateGroup
documentation:
Update a group.

Args:
    id: ID of group to update.
    name: Group name.
    contact: A phone number with format "+X (XXX) XXX-XXXX" or email.
    contactMethod: PHONE or EMAIL.
    description: Group details.
    userRoles: Define user admins and members.

Returns:
    group: the resulting group or None if error.

methods.name: bln.client.Client.updateProject
documentation:
Update a project.

Args:
    id: ID of project to update.
    name: Project name.
    contact: A phone number with format "+X (XXX) XXX-XXXX" or email;
        defaults to author's contact value.
    contactMethod: PHONE or EMAIL; defaults to author's contact method.
    description: Project details.
    isOpen: Whether to make the project open to others on the platform;
        defaults to False.
    userRoles: Define user admins, editors, and viewers; defaults
        to author as sole admin.
    groupRoles: Define group admins, editors, and viewers; defaults
        to no group roles.
    tags: Project tags.

Returns:
    project: the resulting project or None if error.

methods.name: bln.client.Client.get_project_by_id
documentation:
Get the project with the provided id.

Args:
    name (str): The name of the project on biglocalnews.org

Returns: Dictionary with project metadata.

methods.name: bln.client.Client.get_project_by_name
documentation:
Get the project with the provided name.

Args:
    name (str): The name of the project on biglocalnews.org

Returns: Dictionary with project metadata.

methods.name: bln.client.Client.download_file
documentation:
Download `filename` in project `projectId` to `output_dir`.

Args:
    projectId: the id of a Big Local News project.
    filename: the name of a file in the project.
    output_dir: uses current working directory if not specified.

Returns:
    ouput_path: location where file was saved or None if error.

methods.name: bln.client.Client.upload_from_json
documentation:
Upload groups and projects from a json config.

See example_config.json.

methods.name: bln.client.Client.search_groups
documentation:
Return groups where `predicate(group)` is True.

Args:
    predicate: (optional) a function that takes a group and returns
        True or False, i.e. if `predicate(group)` returns True, the
        group is added to the result list.

Returns:
    groups: list of groups where `predicate(group)` is true.

methods.name: bln.client.Client.search_projects
documentation:
Return projects where `predicate(project)` is True.

Args:
    predicate: (optional) a function that takes a project and returns
        True or False, i.e. if `predicate(project)` returns True, the
        project is added to the result list.

Returns:
    projects: list of projects where `predicate(project)` is true.

methods.name: bln.client.Client.search_files
documentation:
Return projects where `predicate(file)` is True.

Args:
    predicate: (optional) a function that takes a file object and
        returns True or False, i.e. if `predicate(file_obj)` returns
        True, the file object is added to the result list. File objects
        are the graphql File type with projectId and projectName added
        for convenience.

Returns:
    files: list of file objects where `predicate(file_obj)` is true.
Big Local News Python Client.
